mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files ( uploader_user_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, content_type, file_size, file_category ) VALUES ( #{uploaderUserId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileCategory} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, uploader_user_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, content_type, file_size, file_category, created_at FROM files WHERE uploader_user_id = #{userId} AND file_category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, uploader_user_id, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_url, content_type, file_size, file_category, created_at FROM files WHERE id = #{id} AND uploader_user_id = #{userId}

SELECT f.id, f.uploader_user_id, f.original_name, f.stored_name, f.file_path, f.file_url, f.content_type, f.file_size, f.file_category, f.created_at FROM files f WHERE f.id = #{id} AND ( f.uploader_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_application_attachments jaa JOIN job_applications ja ON ja.id = jaa.application_id JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id WHERE jaa.file_id = f.id AND cp.user_id = #{userId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM resumes r JOIN job_applications ja ON ja.resume_id = r.id JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id WHERE r.resume_file_id = f.id AND cp.user_id = #{userId} ) )
